title: Moph #4644
definition:
Memphis = "haven of the good"

 1) a capital of Lower Egypt located on the western bank of the Nile
    about 9 miles (15 km) south of Cairo
nasbUsage:

 1) a capital of Lower Egypt located on the western bank of the Nile
    about 9 miles (15 km) south of Cairo

    NASB:  ancient capital of Eg.
